📱 Add to Home ScreenInstall the app — works offline!

Add to Home Screen

Install like a real app — no App Store needed!

1
Open in SafariMust be Safari — not Chrome or Firefox on iPhone.
2
Tap Share ⬆️The box-with-arrow icon at the bottom of your screen.
3
Tap "Add to Home Screen" ➕Scroll the share sheet down to find this option.
4
Tap "Add" ✅The Ladle & Spoon icon appears on your home screen!
1
Open in ChromeUse Google Chrome on your Android device.
2
Tap the three-dot menu ⋮Top right corner of Chrome.
3
Tap "Add to Home screen"Or look for an "Install app" banner at the bottom.
4
Tap "Install" ✅The app icon appears on your home screen!

Weekly Soup Plans
Save 10% every week

Each week, choose from Lia's featured soups (or salads). Pause for up to 4 weeks anytime. 10% off food + 40% off delivery!

Changes must be made by Friday 6 PM

Choose Your Weekly Soup

Default is the week's feature — or pick any soup offered this week!

⏸ About Pausing Pause your subscription for up to 4 consecutive weeks — no questions asked. Just let Lia know by Friday and that week is skipped. Billing resumes automatically when you're ready.

    📋 New Menu Alert

    🍜 Ladle & Spoon menu is LIVE! Split Pea w/ Bacon, Chicken Wonton w/ Bok Choy & Creamy Swiss Onion — plus 2 salads. Order by Friday 6PM for Monday delivery. Pints $8 · Quarts $15. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

    ⭐ Rating Request

    Hi [Name]! 🥣 Hope you enjoyed your Ladle & Spoon delivery! We'd love your feedback — tap here to rate this week's soups: [link] · Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

    💌 Re-engagement (customers with 4+ weeks since last order)

    Hi [Name], we miss you! 🍲 It's been a while since your last Ladle & Spoon order. Come back with 10% off your next order — use code WELCOMEBACK at checkout. Good for one use only, not valid with subscription plans. · Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
